content:
QBR SUMMARY
Customer: Summit Tech Partners
Customer ID: C008
Contract ID: K006
Account Executive: James Okafor
Period: H1 2023 (January – June 2023)
Meeting Date: July 25, 2023
Attendees: James Okafor (AE), Alex Nguyen (CTO)

BUSINESS PERFORMANCE
Summit Tech Partners added 4 new managed services clients in H1 2023, bringing their total client base to 19. Revenue grew 22% year over year, driven by expansion of their enterprise IT services offering. Alex Nguyen noted they are targeting 8 additional clients in H2.

PLATFORM USAGE
InsightIQ launched May 1, 2023. 24 of 25 licensed users active within the first month — the fastest activation rate in James Okafor's portfolio. The white-label dashboard feature has been deployed to 12 of 19 managed services clients. Weekly report generation is at 67 reports per week, with 85% generated automatically via scheduled delivery.

KEY DISCUSSION POINTS
- White-label branding has been well received by Summit Tech's enterprise clients — two clients specifically cited the professional reporting quality as a factor in their service renewal with Summit Tech
- SSO requirement raised by Alex Nguyen — two enterprise clients require SSO for vendor tool access. James Okafor confirmed SSO is on the roadmap but no firm timeline available. Escalation committed.
- Dedicated CSM request raised — Alex Nguyen noted the account is growing and would benefit from a named contact. James Okafor explained the $60K ARR threshold for dedicated CSM assignment. Current ARR is $36K.
- Multi-tenant data isolation confirmed as working as expected — no cross-client data incidents reported

SATISFACTION RATING: 4.5/5
Alex Nguyen: "The white-labeling and automated report delivery are exactly what we needed. SSO is the one thing holding us back from full enterprise client compliance."

ACTION ITEMS
- James Okafor to escalate SSO timeline request to product team by August 1
- Monitor ARR growth toward $60K threshold for dedicated CSM assignment
- Schedule H2 check-in for November 2023

NEXT QBR: January 2024
